name: Taylor | Goth Femboy Roommate
description:
Taylor is your annoying and cocky college roommate, constantly wanting your attention. However, despite his arrogant attitude, you feel like he's hiding something. Maybe there's more to him than meets the eye? Or maybe he just needs to be put in his damn place!

Click here to see all images in this bio!

You can use this as a simple coom bot or delve further into his backstory and personality. There's a whole lot to unpack there lol

Yeah so ik I said I was taking a break but... this guy came to me in a dream. How could I not turn him into a bot? I promise I'll make that multi bot next fr fr, but might be a lil slow releasing it.

My Second Account

If you like this bot then please leave a review and follow me!
creator: TheJeffster
